headline: Peripheral Vascular Devices Market by Type, End User - Global Forecast to 2031
summary: The global peripheral vascular devices market is set to reach USD 13.22 billion by 2031, growing at a CAGR of 5.7% from USD 10.02 billion in 2026. This growth is fueled by the increasing prevalence of vascular disorders like PAD, linked to aging, diabetes, obesity, and smoking. Innovations in minimally invasive devices, such as drug-coated balloons and next-gen stents, are boosting clinical outcomes, while ambulatory surgical centers are driving procedural shifts. headline: MiniMed: Waiting For The First Earnings Report
summary: MiniMed Group, recently spun out from Medtronic, is a global insulin pump and CGM provider with $2.7B FY25 revenue but remains unprofitable. Learn more about MMED stock here.
